svg.text: Automated CI/CD Integration for Zero Critical Violations

g.text: FR-008, FR-010 (hover, focus, active, disabled states)
US-1: Zero Critical Violations in CI
As a developer, I need the CI/CD pipeline to block
deployments with a11y violations so we never ship
✓ Build fails with clear error messages on violations
As a user with low vision, I need all text to meet
7:1 contrast ratio so I can read content without
✓ Normal text 7:1, large text 4.5:1 across all themes
As a user who cannot use a mouse, I need to
navigate and operate all functionality using only
keyboard for equal access to all features.
✓ Tab moves logically, Escape closes modals
As a user with motor impairments, I need all
interactive elements to be at least 44×44 pixels
so I can accurately tap or click them.
✓ All buttons, links, inputs ≥ 44×44 CSS pixels
As a blind user relying on a screen reader, I need
all content announced correctly so I can understand
✓ Alt text, ARIA landmarks, live regions work
As a user who needs extra time, I need no
time-based restrictions so I can work at my
own pace without being logged out.
As a user with cognitive disabilities, I need
content at lower secondary education level
so I can understand it easily.
As a developer, I need real-time a11y feedback
during development so I can fix issues immediately
rather than discovering them in CI.
✓ Console warnings within 2 seconds of save
As a stakeholder, I need a dashboard showing
compliance status so I can monitor progress
Element selector, rule code, severity, remediation
All violations per test run, by page and severity
